diagrams.title: Virtual Circuit Switching Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how packets flow through a virtual circuit with VCI values changing at each router
diagrams.purpose: Understanding VC switching operation and label swapping

diagrams.title: Datagram Packet Flow
diagrams.description: Shows three packets taking different paths and arriving out of order
diagrams.purpose: Understanding independent routing in datagram switching

diagrams.title: VC vs Datagram Comparison Table
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of key characteristics between virtual circuit and datagram switching
elements: Router State (Connection table vs Routing table)
